title: Travis Kalanick's robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z | TechCrunch
summary: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company, Atoms, has raised $1.7 billion in a funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz. Kalanick has also said he wants to get into mining with atoms, going beyond what Pronto already does for vehicles in that industry.
